title: Polydex2EIV
description: An EIV attachment, used for bridging Polymer to EIV
body:
# Polydex2EIV

**Bridging the Gap Between Polymer and EIV — Let Your Recipes Be Seen**

## 📦 What is Polydex2EIV?

**Polydex2EIV** is a **compatibility addon** that connects [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) and [EIV (Extended ItemView)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eiv), enabling full support for **virtual items** and **custom recipes** defined by [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex).

By default, EIV cannot recognize Polymer’s **server-side virtual items**, leading to missing entries in recipe viewers and item lookups. Polydex2EIV fixes that.

## 🔧 Features

- ✅ **Makes Polymer virtual items visible in EIV**
- 📘 **Supports custom recipes** registered via the Polydex API
- 🔄 **Synchronizes item lookup actions** — clicking or keypress correctly opens the recipe page
- 💡 Works with **both server-side and client-side virtual items**
- 🌐 **Requires both sides installed** to function properly

## ❓ Why Use It?

If you're a modpack creator or developer using Polymer to register virtual items (e.g. recipe placeholders, guide items, UI buttons), you’ve likely run into the issue: **EIV can’t find them.** This addon solves that cleanly — **no extra setup, just plug and play**.

## 🧩 Requirements

- [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)
- [EIV](https://modrinth.com/mod/eiv) (A port is available in 1.21.7+: 🔜[Download](https://github.com/SAGUMEDREAM/ExtendedItemView/releases))
- [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex)
- [Packet-Fixer]([https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)
- Must be installed on **both client and server**
